Services

Explore our IT services and infrastructure offerings. Click any service to request support.

Comprehensive IT Services

Protecting Melbourne businesses from downtime with enterprise-grade security and reliable IT support. Our goal is to be your most trusted IT partner, delivering peace of mind through proactive, secure, and efficient technology solutions.

Managed IT Services

Monthly IT support contracts, system monitoring, updates and patch management, helpdesk support, and IT asset management.

Remote & Onsite IT Support

Remote troubleshooting, onsite visits for hardware issues, printer and network troubleshooting, software installation, Windows and Mac support.

Microsoft 365 / Google Workspace Support

Microsoft 365 setup, email migration, Teams and SharePoint configuration, user account management, and email security.

Cybersecurity Services

Antivirus and endpoint protection, firewall configuration, security monitoring, email phishing protection, and security audits.

Cloud Services & Migration

Cloud migration, Azure and AWS setup, cloud backups, hybrid cloud support, and cloud cost optimization.

Network Setup & Management

WiFi setup, router and firewall configuration, switch installation, VPN setup, and network troubleshooting.

Backup & Disaster Recovery

Automated backups, disaster recovery plans, data restoration, and cloud backup solutions.

Server Support & Virtualization

Windows Server support, Active Directory management, virtualization with Hyper-V and VMware, and server maintenance.

Hardware Supply & Setup

Laptop and desktop setup, printer installation, network device installation, and office IT setup for new businesses.

CCTV & Security System Installation

CCTV installation, remote monitoring setup, network cameras, and access control systems.

Browse All Services
